name: AUTH_EMAIL_FROM
description: Default sender address for auth-related email flows.

name: AUTH_GOOGLE_ID
description: Google OAuth client ID for Auth.js sign-in.

name: AUTH_GOOGLE_SECRET
description: Google OAuth client secret for Auth.js sign-in.

name: AUTH_RESEND_KEY
description: Resend API key for email delivery integrations.

name: AUTH_SECRET
description: Auth.js secret used for session signing and middleware token parsing.

name: DATABASE_URL
description: Primary pooled Postgres connection string used at runtime and by Drizzle.

name: DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED
description: Direct Postgres connection string for tasks that should avoid pooling.

name: NEXTAUTH_URL
description: Canonical application URL used by Auth.js callbacks.

name: OPENAI_API_KEY
description: OpenAI API key for LLM-based evaluation.

name: OPENAI_MODEL
description: Default model name for LLM-based evaluation.

name: PGHOST
description: Pooled Postgres host helper for platform integrations.

name: PGHOST_UNPOOLED
description: Direct Postgres host helper for platform integrations.
